name: Merna Hany Mahmoud

projects.name: Smart Meeting Assistant
projects.description: Built an end-to-end AI pipeline for meeting video/audio analysis using speaker diarization, Vision LLMs, and OCR to generate accurate transcripts and automated attendance tracking.

projects.name: Gloves Teleoperation Robot
projects.description: Developed a real-time robotic teleoperation system using AI and computer vision to control a robot remotely through hand gestures.

projects.name: Personalized AI Chatbot
projects.description: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot using FastAPI, FAISS, MongoDB, and transformer models to deliver personalized, context-aware responses with scalable deployment.

projects.name: Facial Recognition Systems
projects.description: Implemented emotion-based facial recognition using OpenCV and transfer learning (CNNs), reaching 90% accuracy on test datasets.

projects.name: Smart Home & Access Control Systems
projects.description: Engineered IoT-based smart home and security systems with RFID and fingerprint authentication, ensuring real-time monitoring and secure automation.

summary: AI Engineer with practical experience in Machine Learning, NLP, and Generative AI. Dedicated to building intelligent, data-driven systems that enhance efficiency and deliver measurable results.
